name: FIREFLY NEUROSCIENCE, INC.
summary: Firefly Neuroscience, Inc. (formerly WaveDancer, Inc.) is a Delaware-incorporated company focused on brain health technology. It develops and commercializes the Firefly System, an FDA-510(k) cleared Brain Network Analytics software platform, and the Evoke System, an FDA-510(k) cleared EEG and ERP acquisition hardware platform. The company targets neurological and mental health conditions including ADHD, MCI, and PTSD, leveraging AI-driven analytics of electroencephalogram data.
